uploadCardDescription: Drop or pick a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG. Every platform uses this image unless you override it below.
uploadHint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, and other browser-readable formats are supported.
siteInfoCardDescription: Used by the manifest, the apple-touch-icon, and the HTML snippet.
shortNameDescription: Shown when the app name is too long for the surface.
descriptionDescription: Optional. Omitted from the manifest when blank.
assetPathDescription: Prefix applied to every href in the HTML snippet and to every src in the manifest icons array.
themeColorDescription: Drives the manifest theme_color and the HTML <meta name="theme-color"> tag.
enableDarkThemeColorDescription: Emits a second <meta name="theme-color" media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)"> tag. The manifest spec doesn't support a dark variant, so the manifest still only stores the light color.
backgroundColorDescription: Manifest background_color. Used by browsers to paint splash screens on PWAs.
optimizePngDescription: Runs every emitted PNG (including the ICO components) through a lossless oxipng pass. Adds a few seconds and downloads a ~150 KB WASM module the first time you generate, but shrinks the zip noticeably.
desktopCardDescription: Controls favicon.ico, favicon-16x16.png, favicon-32x32.png, and (when source is SVG) favicon.svg.
useOriginalSvgDescription: When the source image is SVG, include the original file as favicon.svg alongside the rasterized variants.
marginDescription: Visual breathing room around the source inside the icon.
useDifferentImageDescription: Override the global source image for this platform only.
iosCardDescription: Controls the 180×180 apple-touch-icon.png used on iOS home screens.
iosBackgroundColorDescription: Apple icons must be opaque, so this fill is always applied.
pwaCardDescription: Controls pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png, and the maskable variants.
includeMaskableDescription: Adds pwa-maskable-192x192.png and pwa-maskable-512x512.png and lists them with purpose: maskable in the manifest.
maskableMarginDescription: The W3C-recommended safe area is 40%. Source content stays visible inside any platform mask.
previewGalleryDescription: Browser, search, and home-screen mockups showing the generated assets in context.
previewBeforeGenerateHint: Generate the bundle to see your favicons composited into the chrome below.
resultCardDescription: Click Generate to render every asset, build the zip, and copy the HTML snippet.
resultEmptyDescription: Pick an image and click Generate to assemble the favicon bundle.
manifestPreviewDescription: Edit before shipping if you need extra manifest fields.
invalidImageDescription: Pick a browser-readable image file (PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG) and try again.
generationFailedDescription: Something went wrong while rendering the bundle. Try a different image or refresh the page.
needAppNameDescription: Enter an app name in the Site info card before generating.
needImageDescription: Pick a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG (or use the demo icon) before generating.
missingDedicatedImageDescription: One or more platforms have "Use a different image" turned on but no file picked. Upload the override or turn the toggle off.
